documentation.file_docstring: Get account config from core config Handles two patterns: 1. Simplified single-account: base-level properties create implicit "default" account 2. Multi-account: explicit accounts object For "default" account, base-level properties take precedence over accounts.default For other accounts, only the accounts object is checked
inline_comments: Access accounts via unknown to handle union type (single-account vs multi-account)
For default account, check base-level config first
Base-level properties that can form an implicit default account
Merge: base-level takes precedence over accounts.default
Only return if we have at least username
Fall through to accounts.default if no base-level username
For non-default accounts, only check accounts object
List all configured account IDs Includes both explicit accounts and implicit "default" from base-level config
Access accounts via unknown to handle union type (single-account vs multi-account)
Add implicit "default" if base-level config exists and "default" not already present

functions.name: getAccountConfig
functions.doc: Get account config from core config     Handles two patterns:   1. Simplified single-account: base-level properties crea

functions.name: listAccountIds
functions.doc: List all configured account IDs     Includes both explicit accounts and implicit "default" from base-level config
